headline: BMO Capital Maintains Market Perform on Masco, Lowers Price Target to $75
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Ketan Mamtora   maintains Masco (NYSE:MAS) with a Market Perform and lowers the price target from $77 to $75.

headline: Masco Governance Vote Weighs Special Meeting Rights And Shareholder Value
summary: Shareholder John Chevedden has filed a proposal for Masco to let investors holding 10% of shares call special shareholder meetings. Masco's board is urging shareholders to vote against the proposal at the upcoming annual meeting. The outcome could influence how easily investors can press for changes between regular annual meetings. Masco (NYSE:MAS), trading at $66.58, is coming into this governance debate after multi year share returns of 38.3% over 3 years and 12.7% over 5 years. The stock...
